name: saga-workspace
description: Postgres-backed workspace memory system for agentic work.

scripts.deps:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --wait
scripts.smoke:compiled-config: BIN="$(mktemp -d)/saga"; bun build apps/cli/src/main.ts --compile --no-compile-autoload-dotenv --define 'SAGA_BUILD_PROFILE="production"' --outfile "$BIN" && node scripts/smoke-compiled-config.mjs "$BIN"
scripts.test:integration: node scripts/require-env.mjs SAGA_TEST_DATABASE_URL && vp test run apps/cli/src/index-command.postgres.test.ts apps/cli/src/init.postgres.test.ts apps/cli/src/ingest.postgres.test.ts apps/cli/src/mcp.postgres.test.ts apps/cli/src/recall.postgres.test.ts apps/service/src/api.postgres.test.ts apps/service/src/ingest.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/consolidation-records.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/database.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/extraction-backfill.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/job-runs.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/raw-session-import.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/session-embeddings.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/session-recall.postgres.test.ts packages/db/src/session-safety.postgres.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: vp test run --passWithNoTests --exclude apps/cli/src/index-command.postgres.test.ts --exclude apps/cli/src/init.postgres.test.ts --exclude apps/cli/src/ingest.postgres.test.ts --exclude apps/cli/src/mcp.postgres.test.ts --exclude apps/cli/src/recall.postgres.test.ts --exclude apps/service/src/api.postgres.test.ts --exclude apps/service/src/ingest.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/consolidation-records.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/database.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/extraction-backfill.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/job-runs.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/raw-session-import.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/session-embeddings.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/session-recall.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/session-safety.postgres.test.ts --exclude packages/db/src/session-recall-bench.postgres.test.ts
scripts.verify:integration: bun run check && bun run test:integration
scripts.verify:unit: bun run check:client-boundary && bun run check && bun run test:unit
